name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the light corn syrup, water, vanilla extract, and egg whites until combined.
3. Gradually add the brown sugar and granulated sugar to the mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Add the rolled oats, oat bran, half cup of unbleached white flour, half cup of whole wheat flour, baking soda, and raisins to the bowl. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a cookie sheet lightly sprayed with Baker's Joy.
6. Bake for 15-17 minutes, or until the edges are browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to an airtight container.
8. Store in an airtight container. They will keep well at room temperature and can be eaten within a few days.
